level_signals: Compensation range $87K-$128K base, consistent with entry-to-mid level

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: You have 1-3+ years of experience. You've succeeded in similar cultures that are highly analytical and cross-functional (whether in tech, operations, strategy, consulting, banking, or a related experience).
you enjoy diving deep into data and translating insights into action; you have experience working with Excel and/or SQL.
Own growth strategy and execution by building and scaling playbooks across onboarding, launch, and ongoing performance.
Partner cross-functionally with Merchant Success, Marketing, Product, and Enablement to operationalize merchant growth, co-marketing, and in-app merchandising.
you have a strong bias toward action, are comfortable with ambiguity, thrive in a fast-paced, constantly evolving environment, and are comfortable owning problems end-to-end
you're able to balance customer-first thinking while working directly with top merchants to drive growth and performance.

scope.surface: DoorDash Reservations Marketplace within the In-Store team
scope.business_model: marketplace (B2B2C — connecting consumers to merchant reservation inventory via DoorDash app)
core_responsibilities: Own growth strategy and execution by building and scaling playbooks across onboarding, launch, and ongoing performance
Design and test scrappy, high-impact growth initiatives that drive impact and performance beyond standard playbooks
Analyze merchant performance and marketplace data to identify growth opportunities, diagnose issues, and prioritize the highest-impact initiatives
Partner cross-functionally with Merchant Success, Marketing, Product, and Enablement to operationalize merchant growth, co-marketing, and in-app merchandising

green_flags: Clear product surface and ownership area (Reservations Marketplace)
Explicit cross-functional partners named (Merchant Success, Marketing, Product, Enablement)
Entry-to-mid level role with meaningful ownership scope
Comprehensive benefits package described in detail
red_flags: Visa sponsorship not mentioned — unclear for international applicants
No equity mentioned despite being a tech company role — may be excluded from package at this level
Hybrid policy stated but in-person time requirement not quantified — hard to assess location flexibility
No specific cities listed for this hybrid role despite NYC-specific legal notices appearing in the JD, creating ambiguity about primary work location

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from title 'Associate', reporting structure, years range, and comp)
scope.primary_metrics_inferred (inferred from responsibilities; not stated in JD)
location.remote_us_eligible (inferred from 'hybrid role with time spent in person and remote' language and mention of remote jobs in NYC legal notice)
compensation.location_pay_differential (inferred from 'Base salary is localized according to employee work location')
ambiguities: No specific city or office is named for this role despite the JD being hybrid. The NYC-specific legal notice may suggest NYC is a relevant location, but this is not confirmed as the role's primary location.
The JD says '1-3+ years' — the '+' after '3' creates ambiguity about whether more than 3 years is expected. Treated as a soft upper bound with minimum of 1 year.
Equity is not mentioned in the compensation section, which is unusual for a DoorDash role — may be included but not stated, or may not apply at the Associate level.
